name: VC Assistant
description: Monitors startup document folders, researches public context, applies seven early VC heuristic scoring methods, and writes score-only reports.

document_folder.description: Local folder monitored for startup documents; first-level folders are treated as companies.

output_folder.description: Local folder where per-company reports and the company index should be written.

field_profile.description: Startup evidence fields captured by the analyzer.

monitoring.description: Folder monitoring configuration for one-shot or continuous polling runs.

steps.label: Startup Folder Watcher
steps.goal: Detect changed files, create company work queue, fingerprint packets, and mark unchanged packets.

steps.label: Company Packet Grouper
steps.goal: Group startup documents by company, resolve aliases, and create stable company ids and slugs.

steps.label: Document Evidence Extractor
steps.goal: Extract local text, structured claims, tables, dates, amounts, founder names, traction claims, product/IP claims, and source refs.

steps.label: Claim Normalizer
steps.goal: Build deterministic team, market, traction, financial, risk, IP asset, and comparable-candidate fact tables.

steps.label: Research Planner
steps.goal: Create privacy-safe public research queries from company name, domain, category, and non-confidential claims.

steps.label: Company Identity Researcher
steps.goal: Research company website, Crunchbase/profile pages, LinkedIn/company pages, and identity signals.

steps.label: Funding Researcher
steps.goal: Research funding rounds, investors, accelerator mentions, and press.

steps.label: Market And Comparable Researcher
steps.goal: Research market size, competitors, and public comparable companies.

steps.label: Traction Verifier
steps.goal: Verify public customer, partnership, revenue, product launch, and traction claims.

steps.label: Rendered Page Researcher
steps.goal: Optionally use rendered browser verification for JavaScript-heavy public pages and record blocked outcomes.

steps.label: Research Reconciler
steps.goal: Merge public findings with local claims and flag confirmations, contradictions, missing evidence, and source-quality warnings.

steps.label: Berkus Scorer
steps.goal: Apply Berkus Method 5 bucket scoring with deterministic calculations.

steps.label: Scorecard Bill Payne Scorer
steps.goal: Apply weighted Scorecard / Bill Payne factor scoring.

steps.label: Risk Factor Summation Scorer
steps.goal: Apply 12-risk checklist scoring and adjustments.

steps.label: Venture Capital Method Scorer
steps.goal: Apply exit-back valuation assumptions and VC return math scoring.

steps.label: First Chicago Scorer
steps.goal: Apply bear/base/bull case scoring with probability weighting.

steps.label: Comparables Market Multiple Scorer
steps.goal: Apply public comparable and market multiple evidence scoring when available.

steps.label: Cost To Duplicate Scorer
steps.goal: Estimate rebuild-cost floor from team, R&D, IP, hardware, data, and infrastructure evidence.

steps.label: Score Consistency Auditor
steps.goal: Check math, missing evidence handling, contradictory assumptions, unsupported valuation claims, and formula completeness.

steps.label: Company Report Writer
steps.goal: Write per-company reports: analysis, method scores, research sources, evidence, and warnings.

steps.label: Batch Index Writer
steps.goal: Write root-level company index, research coverage, method coverage, queue, and run summary artifacts.

human.reason: Human approval is required before any external sharing, investment action, founder contact, valuation use, or downstream decision.

metadata.name: VC Assistant
metadata.description: Monitors startup document folders, researches public context, applies seven early VC heuristic scoring methods, and writes score-only reports.
metadata.agent_role: Actor-style VC analysis coworker that prepares source-grounded score reports without issuing investment decisions.
metadata.target_users: VC analysts, angel investors, accelerator reviewers, startup scouts, and founder-led investment teams.
metadata.customizable_for: Pre-seed screening, accelerator batches, angel deal flow, founder note review, and early diligence packet triage.
metadata.problem: Early startup packets are noisy and inconsistent; analysts need quick heuristic reports with evidence, assumptions, and missing-information flags while retaining the final decision.
runtime_features: Crunchbase and public profile verification planning

input_contract.description: Folder-monitoring startup document analysis for early VC heuristic reports.

required_inputs.name: document_folder
required_inputs.description: Local folder containing startup documents grouped by first-level company folders.

required_inputs.name: output_folder
required_inputs.description: Local folder where per-company reports should be written.

optional_inputs.name: monitoring
optional_inputs.description: Enable folder polling and set interval/max cycles.

optional_inputs.name: field_profile
optional_inputs.description: Startup evidence fields to extract and review.

optional_inputs.name: internet_research
optional_inputs.description: Public research configuration for w3m and optional rendered-browser verification of company websites, Crunchbase, public profiles, funding mentions, competitors, and market context.

json.description: Inline JSON object supplied through config or runtime overrides.

file.description: JSON object loaded from a local file path.

human_control.reason: Human approval is required before any external sharing, investment action, founder contact, valuation use, or downstream decision.

final_artifact.description: Score-only VC heuristic report packet with company reports, evidence, public sources, confidence, and next steps.

output_contract.stdout: JSON object with result, final_artifact, artifact paths, and run metadata when the runner is executed directly.

init_config_review.instruction: Ask the user to select a startup document folder, confirm the output folder, and make clear that launch starts a score-only monitoring service.

fields.label: Startup document folder
fields.description: Choose a local folder containing startup packets, preferably grouped by first-level company folders.

fields.label: Output folder
fields.description: Choose where company report folders should be written.

fields.label: Public research
fields.description: Use privacy-safe public research queries that avoid confidential document excerpts.

metadata.local_on_prem_rationale: Startup packets can contain confidential deal flow; local intake and review-only outputs preserve user control.
